expectations.text: Excel has 2 sheets named Summary and Testplan
Testplan sheet has exactly 11 columns matching expected
expectations.evidence: Headers found: ['Feature', 'Sub-feature', 'Brief Description', 'Verification Type', 'Testcase Description', 'Coverpoint Description', 'Checker ID', 'Checker Type', 'Assertion Code', 'Milestone', 'Parent Feature']

expectations.text: All 6 features from spec appear (APB Slave Interface, UART Transmitter, UART Receiver, Baud Rate Generator, Hardware Flow Control, Interrupts)
expectations.evidence: Features found: ['APB Slave Interface', 'Baud Rate Generator', 'Hardware Flow Control', 'Interrupts', 'UART Receiver', 'UART Transmitter'], Missing: []

Random tests found: ['apb_data_bus_rand_test', 'tx_fifo_rand_test', 'tx_data_bits_rand_test', 'tx_stop_bits_rand_test', 'tx_parity_rand_test', 'rx_fifo_rand_test', 'baud_rate_rand_test'], all end with _rand_test: True

expectations.text: Negative/error rows have [NEG] prefix in Sub-feature and Parent Feature populated
expectations.evidence: NEG rows: 4, all have Parent Feature: True, sample: [('[NEG] pslverr Always Zero', 'APB Slave Interface / APB Protocol Compliance'), ('[NEG] TX FIFO Overflow', 'UART Transmitter / TX FIFO')]

expectations.text: At least 2 cross coverpoint rows present
Milestone column uses DV-I/DV-C/DV-F (not M1/M2/M3 or other)
